title: Taxi Bookings
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM BookTaxi WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} Apex taxi booking(s) made during the report period. Booking the Apex taxi is the game's own acknowledgement that sometimes you just need a lift — a non-zero count hints at at least one session where your ship was elsewhere and you needed to get somewhere in a hurry.
details.help: BookTaxi fires when the Apex NPC taxi service is booked. total drives the title as the total trips booked.

tagLines: Apex Interstellar taxi booking records compiled. Passenger transport requisitions archived.
You needed to be somewhere and your ship wasn't where you were. The COVAS doesn't book cabs. You did.
Commander, boarded a taxi. Destination logged. The dignity protocol is in effect.
